title: helianthemum × istriacum
intro: Helianthemum × istriacum, also known as Istrian rockrose or yellow rockrose, is a hybrid plant species that combines the characteristics of Helianthemum italicum and Helianthemum oelandicum. This perennial plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum × istriacum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
